description.zh-Hans: 生成星空/太空/星云背景纹理。具有哈希分布的星星（可变大小、亮度和颜色）、分层星云云层以及可选的月亮/行星天体。所有噪波均可平铺，实现无缝背景图块。
description.en: Generates starry sky / space / nebula background textures. Features hash-distributed stars with variable size, brightness, and color, layered nebula clouds, and optional moon/planet body. All noise is tileable for seamless background tiles.

triggers.zh-Hans: 星空, 太空, 星云, 宇宙, 银河, 星星, 背景
triggers.en: starfield, space, nebula, galaxy, starry sky, cosmos, background

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成星空/太空/星云背景纹理，带分布星星、分层星云和可选天体，适合游戏场景背景。
exampleUsage.en: Generates starfield/space/nebula background textures with distributed stars, layered nebula clouds, and optional celestial bodies for game backgrounds.
